steps.title: Track the meta-analysis result
steps.content: The meta-analysis found observable differences between animals exposed to anthropogenic noise and otherwise similar unexposed animals in every study. Those effects could be beneficial or harmful, but they were substantial.

steps.title: Allow different effects
steps.content: The conclusion should say noise exposure likely has noticeable effects across species while allowing the nature of the effect to differ. A claims larger effects for birds, B excludes other mammals, and D adds an unsupported comparison about reporting detriment. The answer is C.
